mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) FROM foods WHERE rating > 0

SELECT fc.id AS categoryId, fc.name AS categoryName, COUNT(f.id) AS foodCount, IFNULL(SUM(f.rating_count), 0) AS totalComments, IFNULL(AVG(f.rating), 0) AS avgRating FROM food_categories fc LEFT JOIN foods f ON fc.id = f.category_id GROUP BY fc.id, fc.name ORDER BY foodCount DESC

SELECT DATE(date_series.date) AS date, IFNULL(user_stats.new_users, 0) AS newUsers, IFNULL(comment_stats.new_comments, 0) AS newComments, IFNULL(food_stats.new_foods, 0) AS newFoods FROM ( SELECT DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 UNION ALL SELECT 30 ) AS seq_table WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) <= #{endDate} ) AS date_series LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS new_users FROM profiles WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS user_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = user_stats.date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS new_comments FROM comments WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS comment_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = comment_stats.date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS new_foods FROM foods WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS food_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = food_stats.date ORDER BY date_series.date

SELECT DATE(date_series.date) AS date, IFNULL(user_stats.active_users * 5, 0) AS visits, IFNULL(user_stats.active_users, 0) AS uniqueVisitors, IFNULL(comment_stats.total_comments * 3, 0) AS pageViews, 25 AS bounceRate FROM ( SELECT DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 UNION ALL SELECT 30 ) AS seq_table WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) <= #{endDate} ) AS date_series LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users FROM comments WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS user_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = user_stats.date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS total_comments FROM comments WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS comment_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = comment_stats.date ORDER BY date_series.date

SELECT DATE(date_series.date) AS date, IFNULL(rating_stats.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating, IFNULL(rating_stats.total_ratings, 0) AS total_ratings, IFNULL(rating_stats.new_ratings, 0) AS new_ratings FROM ( SELECT DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 UNION ALL SELECT 30 ) AS seq_table WHERE DATE_ADD(#{startDate}, INTERVAL seq DAY) <= #{endDate} ) AS date_series LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_ratings, COUNT(*) AS new_ratings FROM comments WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) AS rating_stats ON DATE(date_series.date) = rating_stats.date ORDER BY date_series.date

SELECT rating, COUNT(*) AS count, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments), 2) ELSE 0 END AS percentage FROM comments WHERE rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating

SELECT CASE preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '口味' WHEN 'price' THEN '价格' WHEN 'environment' THEN '环境' WHEN 'service' THEN '服务' ELSE '其他' END AS preference, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_preferences) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_preferences), 0) ELSE 0 END AS percentage, CASE preference_type WHEN 'taste' THEN '#3b82f6' WHEN 'price' THEN '#10b981' WHEN 'environment' THEN '#f59e0b' WHEN 'service' THEN '#8b5cf6' ELSE '#6b7280' END AS color FROM comment_preferences GROUP BY preference_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
